rationale: Function `conditional_alloc` annotated WUR only when CONFIG_HARDENED_KSTRDUP is defined. Axis-1 detects WUR but evidence carries `conditional_on=CONFIG_HARDENED_KSTRDUP`. Verdict policy still emits EXPLOITABLE (Stage D LLM is expected to attenuate based on build context if needed). Tests that the conditional capture mechanism doesn't suppress the verdict path.
